
## introduction {visibility="hidden"}

## multiple issue {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_missingPiecesMI.qmd >}}

## out-of-order issue {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_missingPiecesOOO.qmd >}}

## real CPUs {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_realCpuIntro.qmd >}}

## complex hazards examples {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooHazards.qmd >}}

## superscalar overall design {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooPipeline.qmd >}}

## overall effect {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooOverallExec.qmd >}}

## register renaming {visibility="hidden"}

### an OOO pipeline (register renaming) {.nostretch}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooPipelineRename.figure.svg){width=900px}

{{< include /ooo/_oooRename.qmd >}}

## renaming exercise? {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooRenameEx.qmd >}}

## instruction dispatch {visibility="hidden"}

### an OOO pipeline (starting instruction) {.nostretch}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooPipelineRegread.figure.svg){width=900px}

{{< include /ooo/_oooDispatch.qmd >}}

## dispatch exercise 1 {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooDispatchEx1.qmd >}}

## functional units {visibility="hidden"}

### an OOO pipeline (execution units) {.nostretch}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooPipelineExecute.figure.svg){width=900px}

{{< include /ooo/_realCpuFU.qmd >}}

## instruction dispatch (two-cycle multiplier) {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooDispatchAlt.qmd >}}

## complex instructions and condition codes {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooMicrocodeSummary.qmd >}}

## reassociation and data flow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_reassocDataFlow.qmd >}}

## data flow as loop optimization

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowLimit.qmd >}}

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowMult.qmd >}}


## OOO limits {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooLimitations.qmd >}}

## the data flow limit {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /intro/_perf-examples.qmd >}}
